commit.message:
LU-9982 tests: Clients striping from mapped FID in nodemap

Added tests for feature (sanity-nodemap.sh)
Tests added:
1: templated file creation (stripe-count)
2: templated file creation (stripe-count and stripe-index)
3: templated file creation (ost-list)
4: templated file creation (stripe-count stripe-index ost-list)
5: templated directory creation (mdt-count)
6: templated directory creation (mdt-index)
7: templated directory creation with parent striping explicitly set
8: templated rewrite, existing striping unchanged
9: templated file creation, explicit stripe prevails
10: templated directory creation, explicit stripe prevails
11: templated directory and file creation with explicit stripe
(setstripe+setdirstripe) prevails
12: templated file creation, OST pool prevail

Test-Parameters: trivial mdscount=2 mdtcount=2 testlist=sanity-nodemap
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-nodemap
Test-Parameters: mdscount=2 mdtcount=2 fstype=zfs testlist=sanity-nodemap
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=sanity-nodemap
